title: Dafi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dafi''' may refer to:

*'''[[Dafi (bounty hunter)|Dafi]]''', a [[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who worked with [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] and [[Remel Fud]].
*'''[[Dafi (criminal)|Dafi]]''', a [[Near-Human]] criminal and associate of [[Lemo]] and [[Sanda]].

{{Disambig}}
